text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: We love youuu! You'll win next time!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. This isn't good enough for me.<n>I can't let
things end like this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Glad you're on board. Let's go back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
We need to double our efforts for the<n>Japanese
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
You were so amazing! If you can do it,<n>then
maybe... just maybe...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Are you all right? Why are you<n>crying?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Though she didn't win, Narita<n>Taishin's powerful
display seems to<n>have won the hearts of many.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With the Satsuki Sho over, it's time<n>for us to focus
on the Japanese<n>Derby!
